abort.cannot_identify: Could not identify the device. Enter the MAC address manually.
abort.invalid_discovery: The discovered device information is invalid.
abort.not_ip2ir: The discovered Global Caché device does not expose infrared-capable ports.

error.cannot_identify: Could not identify the device. Enter the MAC address manually.

confirm_discovery.description: Do you want to set up the discovered iTach IP2IR at {host}?
confirm_discovery.title: Set up discovered iTach IP2IR

discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to set up the discovered iTach IP2IR at {host}?
discovery_confirm.title: Set up discovered iTach IP2IR

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the iTach IP2IR device.
data_description.port: TCP port used by the iTach device.

reconfigure.description: Update the connection details for this iTach IP2IR device.
reconfigure.title: Reconfigure iTach IP2IR

data_description.device_id: MAC address or Global Caché device identifier used to uniquely identify this device.
data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the iTach IP2IR device.
data_description.port: TCP port used by the iTach device.

user.description: Connect to your Global Caché iTach IP2IR device.
user.title: Set up iTach IP2IR

itach_busy.message: The iTach infrared port is busy.

itach_connection_failed.message: Failed to communicate with the iTach device: {error}

itach_rejected_command.message: The iTach device rejected the command: {error}

cannot_connect.description: Home Assistant cannot connect to **{entry_title}**. Check that the iTach device is powered on, reachable from Home Assistant, and using the configured network address. After fixing the network or device issue, reload the integration.
cannot_connect.title: iTach IP2IR cannot be reached

invalid_config.description: Home Assistant could not set up the configured iTach IP2IR device because the stored configuration or device response is invalid. Reconfigure the integration or reload it after fixing the device or network configuration. Error: {error}
invalid_config.title: iTach IP2IR configuration problem

no_ir_ports.description: **{entry_title}** does not currently expose any infrared-capable ports. Check the iTach port configuration and make sure at least one port is configured as `IR Out` or `IR Blaster Out`, then reload the integration.
no_ir_ports.title: No infrared-capable iTach ports are available

abort.command_not_found: The selected command no longer exists.
abort.no_available_infrared_entities: No available infrared entities were found.
abort.no_remote_commands: No commands are configured for any virtual remote.
abort.remote_not_found: The selected virtual remote no longer exists.

error.duplicate_command: A command with this name already exists.
error.duplicate_remote: A virtual remote with this name already exists.
error.infrared_entity_unavailable: Selected infrared entity is not available.
error.invalid_infrared_entity: Selected entity is not a valid infrared entity.
error.invalid_remote: Selected virtual remote no longer exists.
error.remote_name_exists: A virtual remote with this name already exists.
